race.comment: Fascinating race where only one runner is not either on debut or first-up from a spell. BORIDI (1) is one of the first-uppers, set to resume after a fine debut effort when beaten 3.5 lengths by a horse who was all set to start favourite in the Blue Diamond. Been gelded since and two trials suggest he's ready to run a big race. PRESS JONKIT (3) is in Victoria's premier juvenile stable and finished strongly to win the latest jumpout in a performance that suggested he would be suited by a big track like this. PERIDOT (10), on the other hands, has shown great speed to win her latest two jumpouts and she might give them something to catch with the light weight after the claim. RELINQUISHING (11) is a daughter of Wild Ruler who showed a bit in two trials late last month and looks primed for a big debut. The form of ORCHID SKY (9) ties in with BORIDI through Big Sky and a nice recent jumpout suggests he can play a role.
